![](https://images.crunchbase.com/image/upload/51d868f4f22a45d4a8854d60d332e4f9)![](https://images.crunchbase.com/image/upload/83105937771745beb8fe4241c38f4a19)![](https://images.crunchbase.com/image/upload/c_pad,h_72,w_90,f_auto,q_auto:eco,dpr_1/8051c497545347d99bf405d6ffc0314d)

Crunchbase Scout: Your private company research assistant.

Searches keywords across an organization’s associated full description, industries, industry groups, headquarters location, and region

Where the organization is headquartered

The postal code of Organization's HQ address

Descriptive keyword for an organization (e.g. Saas, Android, Cloud Computing, Medical Device)

Name of the Organization

Total number of employees

Date the organization was founded. You can also enter phrases like 'a year ago'

Companies that have at least one active job posting, powered by Jobbio

Involved in a given event(s) as a sponsor, exhibitor, or organization

Types of diversity represented in an organization, specifically of those who are founding members, currently the CEO, or have check-writing abilities in an investment firm. This feature is in beta and may change with future updates.

Available in the Crunchbase dataset but may need to be unlocked to view
